name: Lemon Poppy Seed Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a large bowl.
2. Beat the mixture with an electric mixer for 2 minutes on medium speed.
3. Grease and flour two loaf pans.
4. Pour the batter into the prepared pans.
5. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 1 hour, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
6. These loaves freeze very well. Yield: 2 loaves
